textByHash.158670084a7e4b2935fe37ebe4462ff2e5c64dcf: Quiet! You must not break my concentration!
textByHash.de6d927b47628f31efbaa19703ff6c74f212f459: What? Are you trying to waste my time?
textByHash.efe5d3aad8df800a0896af932079c0705ad10fd8: Oh, hang on. Someone is trying to contact me...
textByHash.18c20b37213b2f8f5afd9fce81bfccb3fd6c12e8: What do you want? Can't you see I'm busy?
textByHash.90587658261f3de901f7271185f7d2975453eb29: Fine. A simple transfiguration spell should resolve things for you.
textByHash.9b07e8431e1ee56e81e35b17a794d053770987fe: Now can you leave me alone? I can't keep affording these distractions!
textByHash.fed310dccc9a94082021dace852b9ebe5a279499: What did you want? Something about an amulet?
textByHash.93155039aa6f9d900ae52f7eefb2e71f363d89e4: Are you serious? What if I'd lost concentration and let this rift collapse? Do you like having a brain that isn't made of mush? Because mush is all that would have been left!
textByHash.9b8d6ba9726d885b365703305d863320b9ce9069: Why should I? I'm soaked thanks to you!
textByHash.aa556e04a96a35131844be75d3b6559f381de37c: Of course he did! Alright then, what do you want?
textByHash.d3171e6b44e8024de7530c26c846d71d04d808fc: Right, just give me a moment.
textByHash.df4e4bef47c57b8f854d36edf9cf17ce7c26b805: Okay, this spell will allow me to triangulate the origin of the amulet. To make things easier, I'm using this rift to compare energy from that origin with energy from the runic altars.
textByHash.ee0a64de8bf04e481f89e91214e08b6df26cd4ed: Of course, thanks to the ways time and space work in this place, the information won't necessarily come in the right order.
textByHash.7749b3e3fb21d5caec13e68de1e29c4116409ece: Meaning I'll need you to help, you fool! You see that energy that's just emerged from the rift? Work out which order it goes in!
textByHash.5fefd35bf8e51e13fabae058d59890184f0dd0bb: Work out which order it goes in!
textByHash.0e56bc74bd866b4357355ee0e59e3c513852e797: Yes, I can see that. Now, hang on.
textByHash.380cad48050de5751419668a226da6b1c37a458b: I've noted the details on this scroll. A competent enough wizard should be able to use it to cast a teleportation spell to take you right there.
textByHash.c1add278f316c34aefa46050828e413df02f3301: With all the time I've spent here, I'd like to consider myself an expert on the Abyss, but there's something very strange about the place this amulet came from.
textByHash.b922ae753476bc1cacb1ea8edadf5ebb4e938348: Well if I knew that, it wouldn't be strange, would it? Now, if you're done bothering me, I need to stay focused on this rift!
textByHash.ecf6defafa20909db0ae0cb7bdad0e6b1606ea5a: Oh the things I would do to you if I wasn't maintaining this rift! Here, take this you fool!
textByHash.bc17cd23c06a085adf45205aac1cf111377deab6: Nothing! Would you leave me alone!
textByHash.f82a568c68555ecc007a17a8055cf48a9ca825f7: Quiet! Why do you all try to break my concentration?
textByHash.90c623b6103c2de3d198d78b654c310c14eac851: Well, if my concentration is broken while keeping this rift open, the results won't be pretty.
textByHash.8a938ac5917c6867fe0486a5b2f3ab77f4f89386: If we are lucky, the heads of anyone within the Abyss will suddenly explode, including us.
textByHash.abc52c240411b043d9744c6a4d004f850abfa593: If we are unlucky, then the entire universe will begin to fold in upon itself, and all reality as we know it will be annihilated in a single stroke.
textByHash.7091311908e153b08a96c54ed8436d790ac6647b: Do you mean what am I doing here in the Abyss? Or are you asking me what I consider my ultimate role to be in this voyage that we call life?
textByHash.621f3661e762efdb491aa3ff907010992b692e98: By remaining here and holding this rift open, I am providing a permanent link between normal space and this strange dimension.
textByHash.6b315c3a58f79a0e91761df73f86e2c803288bb4: As long as my spell remains in effect, we have the capability to teleport into the Abyss.
textByHash.e47249659f21bbdf04d69d8cbfaa8c2b4cecb8f1: Now leave me be! I can afford no distraction in my task!
textByHash.da62fb63a23305fff41058af2cedf5e405f81aad: What? Oh... very well. What did you want?
textByHash.cc6905e15d0fea8230b7c59e9e490549963df836: Don't waste my time if you don't have enough free space to take it.
textByHash.9026344088df14e9ed908bcd10e47dd0137eb5b3: Here, take it. It is important to pool our research.
textByHash.2b3fb2d88041b6b610ba8433da0ba2f43523de32: Here. Be more careful with your belongings in future.
textByHash.3027a01c26aa4498ab4aaad25d49c9f0c9131cf3: You already have a Colossal Pouch. Are you aware of the dimensional turmoil you can cause by using too many pouches at the same time?
textByHash.a7ee85cb4fdecb7a9e944b20c173dfaf3dba3e48: Then go away! Honestly, you have no idea of the pressure I am under. I can't afford any distractions!
textByHash.a565004e2acbd341f621cc1635ecc90b2d5027a5: Good. I'm attempting to subdue the elemental mechanisms of the universe to my will. Inane chatter from random idiots is not helping me achieve this!
textByHash.15988cd34067c1515bf066acde843faca152589e: There, I have repaired your pouches. Now leave me alone. I'm concentrating!
textByHash.d7f5d54fa0a48a235b904684a9cf2f1f593646f2: You don't seem to have any pouches in need of repair. Leave me alone!
textByHash.2d27127a382df9a274289420d5353865c38ccefa: I need you to answer this for me.
textByHash.eba6f5209fbf9ffe36c7139cb6567e91b56bc869: Stop wasting my time! That is wrong!
textByHash.ddf74ab8e9ef388958fe3e5aa72cc4e5b19cdcbd: Why do you interrupt me, traveller? I am experimenting with dark magic; it is a dangerous craft, and I prefer not to be disturbed.
textByHash.854a9b9978be9c39774127f88da87fa6f185865b: There's nothing to see here, just despair and death.
textByHash.a2e3df043aebdd0757cb98db58383b905d6e2fdb: Can I help you with something, traveller? I am experimenting with dark magic; it is a dangerous craft, and I prefer not to be disturbed.
textByHash.990adfd71c84bceab1834bbd40a81ef7574b5895: Your staff is already as fully charged as it can go.
textByHash.b430b5a5dfaeeabfe863723b68ad6bf1a090bd49: I'll want 100,000 coins to recharge the Staff of Iban.
textByHash.b9600f5a9945a33e0a94f7be9002f50c08371389: Hah! Yes, I can upgrade it to hold 2500 charges, enough to cast Iban's magic 2500 times at monsters or 1250 times at people like you. That'll cost you 200,000 coins.
textByHash.456e6d8f6fb4a008105abc087e3be573be807764: The Staff of Iban holds dangerous magic, traveller. I can fix it, but it will cost you - the process could kill me!
textByHash.5cc40a6e8e3a781c9515c58722896610e4eede0c: 200,000 coins. That'll give it 120 charges, enough to cast Iban's magic 120 times at monsters or 60 times at people like you.
textByHash.abb015b2ca4656c598beba19212e28400461751f: You be careful with that thing!
textByHash.a313cbc10d7e69e5c76ebc095e6c6adf04f7d2d6: Hah! Yes, I can upgrade it to hold 2500 charges, enough to cast Iban's magic 2500 times at monsters or 1250 times at people like you. That'll cost you 400,000 coins.
textByHash.20f1e2afd7f9a8b9c04f9ffdd5efe5c15e149844: Traveller, I have no idea what you are talking about. If you want my help with staves, perhaps you should show me one.
textByHash.86e4a75a2634146f129f56097fc42815b6ca5063: Your items interest me not, traveller.
